sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2917" key="a)kanqoplh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκανθοπλήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n2917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wounded by the prickle</tr_> of a fish (cf.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρυγών</foreign>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, Ὀδυσσεὺς ἀ.</foreign>, name of play of Sophocles.</sense> </entryFree>
